titleStmt.title: SII 29.81: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 81. (A.R. No. 92 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALAGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: On three faces of a huge pillar in the tank behind the Sōmēśvara temple.

This very lengthy record engraved on three faces of a pillar refers to the rule of the king Tribhuvanamalladēva and is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 50, Viśvavāsu, Chaitra, ba. 3, uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, Monday. It corresponds to 1125 A.D., March 24 f.d.t. 06 [Tuesday]. uttarāyaṇa saṁkrānti is a mistake for mēsha saṁkrānti.

It records the gift of the village Pānupuṟa, excluding the dēvabhōga land formerly granted to Akkabasadi near Poḷalu to the goddess Ambikadēvi of Ambara-tilaka by prince Sōmēśvara at the request of daṇḍanāyaka, mahāpradhāna, maneverggaḍe Sāyimayya, the daṇḍanāyaka of Koḷḷipāke-7000. Kēsirāja, the perggaḍe of the goddess (dēvīya-perggaḍe), was made in charge of the gift.
On three faces of the pillar the record contains praśastis of prince Somēśvara and Svāmi-daṇḍādhipa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mudamabhimata lakṣmē bhavyakōṭiṁnayaṁ
tē nirupama guṇaratnādanaṁta kāṁti
sphuraṁti sakaḷa samaya dharmmā cā
ragamyārha mūḷa prakṛti ramṛta
mūrttiryyakṣiṇē rakṣitādvaḥ . ©
svasti samasta bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīva
llabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama
bhaṭṭāraka satyāśraya kuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābhara
ṇa śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvaru sukhasaṁka
thā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire tadātmajaṁ
samasta bhuvana mahānīya mahimōttuṁ
ga cāḷukya gaṁga mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvaraṁ paramahēśvaraṁ vijayalakṣmī ni
vāsa dakṣiṇadōrddaṇḍaṁ dvādaśa maṇḍa
ḷika maṇpaḷi mārttaṇḍaṁ pratāpā
krāṁta navakhaṇḍa bhūmaṇḍaḷa rāja
līlā camatkṛtākhaṇḍaḷaṁ kōdaṇḍa ca
turbhbhujaṁ ś®ṁgāra makaradhvajaṁ tri
bhuvanaraṁga pravarttita kīrtti narttakī
narttana sūtradhāraṁ śaraṇāgata va
jra prākāraṁ mūrurāyakali birudaku
vara hṛdayākaṁ paṁtyāgajagajhaṁnanartthi
jina ciṁtitārddha ciṁtāmaṇi subha
ṭa maṇḍaḷika makuṭa cūḍāmaṇi kuṁ
taḷa rājyābhyudaya kāraṇaṁ bappa
nagandhavāraṇaṁ śrī manmahā māḍaḷēśvaraṁ
cāḷukya gaṁga permmāḍi kumāraṁ sō
mēśvaradēvaṁ . Ā pūrvvādri śiḷāśi
khaṇṭa kaṭakādāsētu sīmāvane Āpāścā
tyapayōnidēru pavanādhāramya hēmā
caḷādākaḻpaṁ vasudhādipatya padavī mā
ruvyā māṇaściraṁ jīyāda pratima pra
tāpa vibhava sōmēśvarōrvvīśvaraḥ viśvadha
rādharandhara bhujāparighaṁ draviḷā
dinātha hastyaśva padāti sādhanavakṣa
ya kāraṇa kōpa pāvakaṁ sāśvata kīrtti
yiṁdedhare baṇnisebāpu caḷukya
gaṁga sōmēśvaradēva voppida ni
ḷāvaḷayādhipa rājaputraroḷ .
tatpāda padmōpajīvi samadhigata paṁca
mahāśabda mahā sāmaṁtādhipa
ti mahāpracaṇḍa daṇḍanāyakaṁ .
jayati bhuvana bhūṣābhūta vi
khyātamūrttiḥ digibha daśana līlāśliṣṭha
vispaṣṭaṁ kīrttiḥ vividhanṛpama
dēbhavrātayūdhādhināthaḥ pra
dita vitaraṇa śrīsvāmi daṇḍādhināthaḥ ©

Apratima pratāpananavadya guṇaṁ ni
jidānatṛpta dēvaprakaraṁ samasta jaga
tītaḷa narttita kīrtti sāvidēva prabhu
daṇḍanātha tiḷakaṁ negaḻdaṁ jagadoḷ
jinānurāga prabhavāha sampadayē
virppa jinōkti saduktiyappinaṁ . pra
bhu śakti khyātiyiṁdaṁ nijipati
gatuḷaiśvaryyamaṁ maṁtraśakti prabheyiṁ
tatprājya rājyābhyudaya padaviyaṁ
svīkṛtōtsāha śaktiprabhava śrī yiṁtadu
tsāha menōda vipadaṁḍe sāmānya
saṁpatprabhu maṁtrōtsāha śaktitrayanaya
niyataṁ svāmidaṇḍādhināthaṁ . śaranidhi
yaṁtaśēṣa mahimāsvadaneṁbara
daṁte mitrasadguru kanirājavaibhava karaṁ
raviyeṁtese dānabhōga naṁburu hatanū
jinaṁtē caturānana nagēṁdradaṁte su
sthira taraneṁdu baṇnipudu sāvi camū
patiyaṁ jagajjanaṁ . harihara ji
na buddha padāṁburuhana madbhrama
ranoppidaṁ sakaḷa vasundharege ca
tassamaya samuddharaṇaṁ śrī svā
midēva daṇḍhādhīśaṁ .Here the boar lifting the earth, the cow and the calf, the dagger, the Svastika and
tṛkaḷiṁgāvani pāḷanaṁ samaradōḷ beṁ
koṇḍu taddēśamaṁ prakaṭāṭō padasūṟe
goṇḍu tadudagrē bhaṁgaḷaṁ muttikoṇḍu ku
mārāgraṇigeḷdaṁ cakritanayaṁ sōmēśva
rōrvviśvaraṁ sakaḷa śrīvara niṁtidaṁniṟe
sidaṁ ś®ṁchajjaya staṁbhamaṁ .

Aṁbara tilakasthāna doḷaṁbara taḷatiḷa
ka mesedu durvve lalanāḷaṁbana
ratnastaṁbha mideṁbinegaṁ svāmi
dēvakīrttistaṁbhaṁ . svasti śrī
maccāḷukya vikrama varṣada
Ayvattaneya viśvāvasu saṁvatsara
da caitra bahuḷa tadige
sōmavāradaṁduttarāyaṇa saṁ
krānti nimittaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ cāḷukya gaṁga permmāḍi ku
māraṁ sōmēśvara dēvarmmahā
pradhānaṁ maneverggaḍe koḷḷipāke
yerccāsirada daṇḍanāyakaṁ sāyi
mayyaṁgaḷa binnapadaṁ nijarā
jadhāni koḷḷipākeya cāḷukya
kuḷatiḷakamenisidaṁbara tiḷaka
daṁbigādēvi gaṁgabhōraṁga bhō
gaṁgaḷige poḷala baḷiya pānu
puṟāyeṁbūraṁ sarvvanamasyaṁ
sarvvabādhā parihāramāge
dhārapūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭar .
dēviya perggaḍeyāgi kēsirāja nī
darmma manūrjjita māge naḍesuvaṁ .
bahubhirvasudhādattā rājabhissagarā
dibhi ryyesya yesya yadā bhūmi stasya
tasya tadāphaḷaṁ . madvaṁśajāḥ parama
hīpati vaṁśajāvaṁ pāpādapēta ma
nasō bhuvi bhāvi bhūpāḥ yē pāla
yaṁti manudharmma mimaṁ samastaṁ
tēṣāṁ mayā viracitōṁjalitēṣa
mūrdniḥ . Idanā caṁdrārkkaṁbara
muditōditamāge kādavaṁ para
ma sukhāsvadanakkaṁ pāpadiṁ naḷida
durātmaṁ narakagatigegaḷagaḷa ni
ḷiguṁ . śrī madakkabasadige pū
rvvadalu naḍava dēvabhōga svāmyaṁ
poragāgi biṭṭar . śrī śrī śrīThe symbols of Sun and Moon are engraved below.
Digital edition of SII 29.81 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
